description: You are a technical director at an animation studio. The lightweight Python software rasterizer at /home/ga/workspace/tiny_rasterizer/ is producing distorted, inside-out, and upside-down images. Fix the mathematical and logical bugs in the rendering pipeline—specifically within backface culling, Z-buffer depth testing, perspective divide, barycentric coordinates, and viewport transformation—to ensure that running `python render.py` produces a correct 3D render of the torus.

metadata.soc_major_group: Arts, Design, Entertainment, Sports, and Media
